report_markdown:
# Benchmark Index Report

- Analysis time: 2026-03-24T13:35:00+00:00
- Goal: Review WeChat and Toutiao benchmark cases for a pro-first finance decision-journal account
- Commercial center: professional investors, research users, and high-participation retail investors who pay for better judgment structure
- Minimum read band: 5w+
- Case library: decision-journal-benchmark-cases
- Cases scanned: 6
- Qualified cases: 6
- Threshold exceptions kept: 1

## Strategy Implications

- 保留“低于 10W+ 但高商业适配”的例外池，不要用流量阈值一刀切掉高价值样本。
- 头条更适合承担公共化外壳和冷启动获客，标题先写后果、冲突或受影响的人。
- 高商业适配案例普遍在卖“重复使用的决策效率”，不是在卖更多热点或更强情绪。
- 把高流量案例只当包装 benchmark，不要直接把它们当产品方向。

## Mixed Benchmarks

### 市值风云 | 市值风云头条内容模型

- Platform: toutiao
- URL: https://36kr.com/p/1722055573505
- Published at: 2019-04-21T16:00:00+00:00
- Read band: 5w+
- Classification: mixed (qualified)
- Scores: acquisition 70 / commercial 81 / decision density 86
- Copy: 外层包装先写事件、后果或受影响的人，再进入方法层；从“serious investors and market observers”这个受影响群体切入；保留高密度判断结构，而不是只做情绪性观点；让免费内容自然导向一个可重复购买的付费资产；头条标题先交代公共后果，再把方法放进正文
- Avoid: n/a
- Notes: Useful to prove Toutiao can still feed a narrower high-value audience even below 10w.

## Acquisition Benchmarks

### 金融八卦女 | 三亚民宿老板，等不到今年春节

- Platform: toutiao
- URL: https://cj.sina.com.cn/articles/view/5240327938/138590f0200102n6vk
- Published at: 2026-01-11T16:00:00+00:00
- Read band: 100w+
- Classification: acquisition (qualified)
- Scores: acquisition 94 / commercial 58 / decision density 54
- Copy: 外层包装先写事件、后果或受影响的人，再进入方法层；从“holiday homestay operators under policy and demand stress”这个受影响群体切入；头条标题先交代公共后果，再把方法放进正文
- Avoid: 不要把高流量误判成高付费意愿
- Notes: Very strong Toutiao acquisition benchmark for public-facing packaging and consequence-led framing.

### 秦朔朋友圈 | “秦朔朋友圈”正式开张

- Platform: wechat
- URL: https://www.pingwest.com/a/44088
- Published at: 2015-11-15T16:00:00+00:00
- Read band: 10w+
- Classification: acquisition (qualified)
- Scores: acquisition 74 / commercial 50 / decision density 54
- Copy: 用更高一级的问题意识切入，而不是从具体工具讲起；外层包装先写事件、后果或受影响的人，再进入方法层；从“business and finance readers”这个受影响群体切入
- Avoid: 不要假设自己有同等创始人声望；不要把高流量误判成高付费意愿；不要只抄内容外壳，不抄它的转化承接
- Notes: Useful as a WeChat authority-led acquisition benchmark, but not a direct product benchmark.

### 正解局 | 伊朗总统坠亡，跟咱有关系吗？

- Platform: wechat
- URL: https://www.36kr.com/p/2838954851961729
- Published at: 2024-05-20T16:00:00+00:00
- Read band: 10w+
- Classification: acquisition (qualified)
- Scores: acquisition 74 / commercial 50 / decision density 54
- Copy: 外层包装先写事件、后果或受影响的人，再进入方法层；从“broad business readers trying to understand why the event matters”这个受影响群体切入
- Avoid: 不要把高流量误判成高付费意愿；不要只抄内容外壳，不抄它的转化承接
- Notes: Strong public-facing wrapper benchmark. High acquisition fit, weaker direct monetization lesson.

## Commercial-Fit Benchmarks

### 市值风云 | 市值风云微信内容模型

- Platform: wechat
- URL: https://36kr.com/p/1722055573505
- Published at: 2019-04-21T16:00:00+00:00
- Read band: unknown
- Classification: commercial-fit (qualified_exception)
- Scores: acquisition 31 / commercial 87 / decision density 90
- Copy: 从“serious investors and market professionals”这个受影响群体切入；保留高密度判断结构，而不是只做情绪性观点；让免费内容自然导向一个可重复购买的付费资产；公众号负责解释、归档和转化承接
- Avoid: n/a
- Notes: Not a high-read WeChat case, but a strong commercial exception benchmark because buyer quality outruns public virality.

### 华尔街见闻 | 见闻主编精选 / 必读

- Platform: wechat
- URL: https://www.newrank.cn/article/detail/7946
- Published at: 2017-08-24T16:00:00+00:00
- Read band: 5w+
- Classification: commercial-fit (qualified)
- Scores: acquisition 51 / commercial 86 / decision density 88
- Copy: 从“serious finance readers with repeated information overload”这个受影响群体切入；保留高密度判断结构，而不是只做情绪性观点；让免费内容自然导向一个可重复购买的付费资产；公众号负责解释、归档和转化承接
- Avoid: n/a
- Notes: Below the old 10w threshold but an essential commercial-fit benchmark because it proves users pay for selection and speed.

## Watchlist

- none

## Rejected Cases

- none
